author: Pat
description: Manage reusable Obsidian style profiles, path overrides, and visual settings through a native settings interface. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: JQML
manifest.description: Manage reusable style profiles, path overrides, and visual settings through a native settings interface.
manifest.name: Style Controller

releases.author: jqml
releases.description:
- Reusable style profiles with a built-in Default profile for native styling.
- Path overrides for applying visual settings to matching notes.
- Runtime CSS generation scoped to active Markdown views.
- Image controls for alignment, width, and explicit-size behavior.
- Blank/default controls preserve native Obsidian or theme behavior.
- Local-only operation with no remote assets, telemetry, or network requests.
releases.name: Style Controller 0.1.0
